skills.name: Concentrated Fire
skills.description: Fires multiple bullets in rapid succession at an enemy.

skills.name: Caracole
skills.description: Shoot forward while pushing yourself back with recoil. Attacked enemies get silenced for a certain time and decrease Accuracy by 25%.

skills.name: Limacon
skills.description: When mounted, boosts your mobility to shoot the enemies rapidly. While Limacon effects are active, becomes available to attack with a pistol. Limacon effect removes when using the skill again. (Activated when the PIstol is equipped in the main slot)

skills.name: Marching Fire
skills.description: March forward while shooting. The enemies in front get attacked.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.2 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio
Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Serial Bullet
skills.description: When a Pistol property attack is accurate, it smashes inside and gives additional damage. 1 [Serial Bullet] stacks when you give damage and the buff removes at 60 stacks, applying cooldown.

attributes.name: Concentrated Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Concentrated Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Caracole: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Caracole] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Limacon: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increase in Pistol basic attack factor of [Limacon] is 0.5% increase per attribute level

* Additional 10% increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Gun: Accuracy
attributes.description: * Increases accuracy by 5% per attribute level when you attack an enemy

attributes.name: Caracole: Desertion
attributes.description: * Duration of [Caracole: Unable to Attack] debuff doubles but the caster also gets the debuff

attributes.name: Limacon: Spread
attributes.description:
* When [Limacon] hits its target, it spreads to attack nearby enemies

and damages up to 4 enemies

* Decreases attack speed by 20%

* When using Marching Fire, it spreads to damage 1 enemy

(Increases Cooldown of Marching Fire by 10 seconds)

* Increases SP consumption by 5

attributes.name: Limacon: Spread
attributes.description:
* When [Limacon] hits its target, it spreads to attack nearby enemies

and damages up to 4 enemies

* Decreases attack speed by 20%

* When using Marching Fire, it spreads to damage 1 enemy

(Increases Cooldown of Marching Fire by 10 seconds)

* Increases SP consumption by 5

attributes.name: Marching Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Marching Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Concentrated Fire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Concentrated Fire] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Caracole: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Caracole] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Limacon: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Limacon] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Marching Fire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Marching Fire] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Schwarzer Reiter: Special Steering
attributes.description:
* When moving while mounted on the companion, 1 [Motion] buff stacks every 0.5 seconds(Maximum 25 stacks)nl}* While standing, 1 [Motion] buff decreases every 5 seconds

* Minimum Critical Rate of Schwarzer Reiter skill attack increases by 1%

* Can be stacked up to 20

*Resets the stack when dismounted from the companion

attributes.name: Serial Bullet: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Serial Bullet] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Serial Bullet: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Serial Bullet] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Marching Fire: Taking Cover
attributes.description:
* Decreases Accuracy by 1000

* Move Speed of enemy in range decreases by [skill level] during the skill duration, struck enemy receives Silence for 2 seconds by 10% chance

* Increases Cooldown by 30 seconds

* Deactivates when [Arts] Evasive Action: Duration is ON.

attributes.name: Schwarzer Reiter: Long-ranged Shot
attributes.description: * The range of the basic attack increases by 100. When the range between the enemy increases within the increased range, the chance that the attack misses increases up to 50%

attributes.name: Evasive Action: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the Evasion of [Devaluation] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Evasive Action: Duration
attributes.description:
* Nullifying attack effect of [Evasive Action] is removed and duration is changed to 30 minutes (12 seconds in PvP), changes Evasion rate increase by 12 + [skill level] * 2%

* Deactivates when Schwarzer Reiter: Long-ranged Shot is ON.

attributes.name: Markmanship: Additional Damage
attributes.description: * Additional damage increases by [Physical ATK x 10% per attribute level]
